title: Feedback Event v1
description: Unified feedback event for Requirement Compiler Quality Loop. Captures planner diffs, evaluator rejections, golden set violations, and replay failures. All value fields are secret-safe (truncated >=256 chars + regex scrubbed).

event_id.description: Globally unique event ID. Format: fe-<ISO8601_compact_ts>-<sha8>.

event_type.description: The type of feedback event. planner_diff: planner modified compiled PRD field. evaluator_reject: evaluator rejected compiled output. golden_set_violation: golden case assertion failed. replay_fail: failure replay produced different result.

actor.description: The role that generated this feedback event.

severity.description: info: minor diff / observation. warn: field mismatch needing attention. error: critical violation (secret leak, hard gate fail).

ts.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the event.

ir_path.description: Dot-path into the Requirement IR indicating which field was affected. Used by planner_diff and evaluator_reject event types.

original_value.description: The value as compiled by the Requirement Compiler. MUST be secret-safe: truncated to 256 chars if >=256, then regex-scrubbed for secrets.

modified_value.description: The value after planner/evaluator modification. MUST be secret-safe: same truncation + scrubbing rules as original_value.

reason.description: Short human-readable explanation of why the modification was made or why the rejection occurred.

actual.description: Actual observed value (for evaluator_reject / golden_set_violation). Secret-safe.

suggested_fix.description: Suggested fix for the issue (for evaluator_reject).

case_id.description: Golden case ID (for golden_set_violation / replay_fail). References golden-set-spec.md case_id.

field.description: Specific field within the golden case that violated the assertion (for golden_set_violation).

failure_kind.description: Classification of the replay failure (for replay_fail).

diff_summary.description: Brief summary of the diff between expected and actual replay output (for replay_fail).

round.description: Sprint round when this event was generated.

$comment: Secret-safe enforcement: original_value, modified_value, expected, actual, and diff_summary MUST NOT contain raw secrets. Implementations MUST apply: (1) truncate values >=256 chars to 253 chars + '...', (2) regex-scrub api_key/token/password patterns with <REDACTED_*> placeholders. Schema maxLength constraints enforce truncation; regex scrub is implementation responsibility.
